response.overview: A tender indie-folk ballad about longing, devotion, and emotional escape, Sailor Song follows a narrator overwhelmed by the intensity of newfound love. Built around intimate acoustic instrumentation and Gigi Perez's emotionally charged vocals, the song explores themes of desire, vulnerability, faith, and queer identity. After gaining massive popularity through TikTok, the track became Perez's breakthrough hit and introduced her music to a worldwide audience.
response.tagline: At the Beach, in Every Life
response.title: Sailor Song
